conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions - [Your Name/Organization Name]

Dear [Gallery Name/Contact Person Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to you as an admirer of [Gallery Name]’s curated collections and your commitment to showcasing diverse perspectives in the contemporary art scene. I have long appreciated the quality of work your gallery presents, and I am interested in learning more about your upcoming programming.

Could you please provide information regarding any scheduled exhibitions or artist showcases for the next quarter? I am particularly interested in any new installations that align with the gallery's signature artistic vibes and funky aesthetics, as I find your unique approach to curation very compelling.

If you have a press kit, a digital calendar of events, or a newsletter I could subscribe to, I would be very grateful if you could share those details with me.

Thank you for your time and for your continued contribution to the arts community. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Portfolio/Website Link, optional]<turn|>
